Table of Contents

Interface ITableCrawler2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a crawler capable of traversing tables.

[Guid("C0463461-E1E9-46BE-8006-0F6C1F49F8D1")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITableCrawler2 : ITableCrawler

Properties

BlockField

The name of the field that contains values that identify blocks of related items.

string BlockField { get; set; }

Property Value

string

esriCrawlerDataSourceType CrawlerItemType { set; }

string GroupField { get; set; }

Property Value

string

HasThumbnail

Indicates whether the input mosaic dataset has thumbnail.

bool HasThumbnail { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaximumMergeItemsCount

The maximum number of crawled rows allowed in a merged record.

int MaximumMergeItemsCount { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MosaicDataset

The mosaic datset being crawled by the crawler.

IMosaicDataset MosaicDataset { get; set; }

IMosaicDataset
